status_summary: Round 2 answered (G–M, 2026-04-26). Deck deployed to GitHub Pages (S39). Principal outreach written for Mike/Matthew/Jessica. Active: update deck with G1–G3 canon, await principal responses (I3, I4), wire Concept→Mesh→UE5 path in Volta.

open_tasks.title: Fill Round 2 Section G (Q1-Q5) — IP definition
open_tasks.resolution: G1–G4 locked 2026-04-26 via docs/round2-answers.md. G5 (IP ownership) open — Andy's call.

open_tasks.title: Promote Midjourney references into Volta catalog as REFERENCE-tier assets
Decide stylized rig pipeline
open_tasks.resolution: Custom stylized rigs default; MetaHuman as fallback abstraction seam (K3 locked 2026-04-25)

open_tasks.title: Get answers from principals: VP Supervisor gold-standard pipeline (I3); FX Editor toolchain + round-trip format (I4)
Stand up Concept->Mesh->UE5 lookdev path in Volta (per K4)
Update deck with Section G canon (G1 one-para pitch slide, G2 hero asset list, G3 story moment)

recent_decisions.decision: Visual style is stylized painterly/storybook, NOT photoreal — settles Q21 from Round 2
recent_decisions.evidence: 20 MJ generations + 2 desktop saves all in painterly/illustrated mode; big-eyed plush captains, dreamlike teal/gold palette

recent_decisions.decision: Concept materials referenced by absolute path, not duplicated into project tree
recent_decisions.rationale: Source images live in OneDrive backup; Volta catalog will import them as REFERENCE-tier when per-project catalog is wired

recent_decisions.decision: K3 LOCKED — custom stylized rigs are the default for hero characters; MetaHuman is the fallback abstraction seam, not the default
recent_decisions.rationale: Photoreal-engineered MetaHuman fights the painterly/storybook aesthetic. Demonstrating speed (artist principal) on a MetaHuman would weaken the pitch.

recent_decisions.decision: K4 LOCKED — environment approach is Concept (Midjourney) -> Mesh (Meshy/photogrammetry) -> handcrafted UE5 lookdev. Pure UE5 PCG rejected.
recent_decisions.rationale: PCG procedural fights the painterly aesthetic; concept-driven workflow keeps the look-dev lane in the artist principal's hands.

recent_decisions.decision: Open principal-routed questions tracked in docs/principal-questions.md (I3, I4)
recent_decisions.rationale: Keeps questionnaire-locked answers separate from items that need a real conversation with the four principals.

recent_decisions.decision: Round 2 (Sections G–M) fully answered and processed. G1–G4 locked; G5 IP ownership pending Andy's call. Principal-routed I3 and I4 remain open.
recent_decisions.rationale: Closes the questionnaire phase. Next work: update deck with G1–G3 content, then wire Concept→Mesh→UE5 path in Volta.
